title: Meastrinnar

'''Meastrinnar''' was an [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], it rebelled against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], leading to an Imperial [[Pacification of Meastrinnar|pacification campaign]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] [[Vondrel]]. The Empire eventually discovered a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|intelligence]] cell in Vondrel's sister city [[Vondrol]]; however, due to a communications error, a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] unit under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]] stormed a [[Unidentified orphanage (Meastrinnar)|building]] in Vondrel instead.

After Northal's [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] had [[Death/Legends|killed]] dozens of supposed Rebels, the [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] belatedly realized that they were, in fact, in an orphanage and that their victims had been [[Sleep/Legends|sleeping]] [[Youngling/Legends|children]]. Although the Empire subsequently covered up the true nature of the massacre, the conflicted Northal himself eventually defected to the Alliance. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, Meastrinnar was a part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Description==
Meastrinnar was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CRO" /> located in the [[Meastrinnar system/Legends|Meastrinnar system]], a part of the [[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]] portion of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. It was situated on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Namadii Corridor/Legends|Namadii Corridor]], which connected it to the [[Aphran system/Legends|Aphran]] and [[Voltare system/Legends|Voltare systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
[[File:Northal.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Vin Northal led an assault on Meastrinnar that saw the deaths of dozens of innocent children.]]
At some point during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], by the [[Time/Legends|time]] that shortly followed the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Meastrinnar was rebelling against the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. An Imperial [[Pacification of Meastrinnar|pacification campaign]] was waged in the planet's [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Vondrel]], with a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] detachment under the [[Commanding officer/Legends|command]] of [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guardsman]] [[Vin Northal/Legends|Vin Northal]] participating in the operations. The Empire eventually discovered the presence of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|intelligence]] cell in Vondrel's sister city [[Vondrol]],<ref name="CRO" /> and the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]]<ref name="CSWE ISB">{{CSWECite|II|96|Imperial Security Bureau (ISB)}}</ref> sent a transmission to Northal's unit ordering it to eliminate the cell.<ref name="CRO" />

However, the transmission was decoded incorrectly and the settlement names were switched. Consequently, under the cover of darkness, Northal led the detachment in storming a [[Unidentified orphanage (Meastrinnar)|building]] thought to harbor the Rebel presence—in reality an orphanage—and shooting any lifeforms the Imperials encountered in it. A few [[Standard second|seconds]] later, however, the [[Imperial officer/Legends|officer]] realized the unit's mistake and that his [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] had [[Death/Legends|killed]] dozens of [[Youngling/Legends|children]] in their [[Sleep/Legends|sleep]].<ref name="CRO" />

Northal ordered an immediate withdrawal from the site. His superiors considered the operation to have been a success, and, rather than acknowledge a grave mistake on the Empire's part, Meastrinnar's [[Media/Legends|media]] networks labeled the event a great "military victory." Northal himself, shaken by the experience on the planet as well as the realizing of the true nature of other Imperial operations, soon decided to defect to the Alliance.<ref name="CRO" /> Between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], Meastrinnar was a part of the Empire's successor [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] government, the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Locations==
Meastrinnar had two sister cities, Vondrel and Vondrol, with the former being the site of an orphanage.<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Meastrinnar was created by [[David R. Tulo, Jr.]] and was introduced in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Meastrinnar [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-8.<ref name="TEA" />
